title: psychotria aubletiana var. cacuminis
intro: Psychotria aubletiana var. cacuminis, also known as the Brazilian barberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria aubletiana var. cacuminis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
